prompt: Do not change the face. Preserve 100% facial identity and resemblance. Create an artistic long-exposure fashion portrait of a woman, photographed on a smartphone or camera with intentional motion blur. She has a loose low braided bun, with a long strand of hair covering nearly half of her face. Her gaze is directed downward and to the side, one eye mostly hidden, lips slightly parted. She wears large statement gold earrings, with bare shoulders visible. Skin is smooth and luminous with soft peach-rose blush, subtle highlighter, defined lashes, light eyeshadow, and matte dusty-rose lips outlined with a slightly darker lip liner. Extreme close-up vertical portrait (9:16), framed from upper chest to head, face filling most of the image and positioned slightly right of center. Neutral light-gray or off-white background. Soft natural window light creates warm, creamy golden tones and gentle facial modeling. Strong intentional motion blur affects the entire frame, especially the earrings and hair, creating elegant golden streaks, while the center of the face remains slightly sharper. Minimal noise, soft contrast, light editing. Mood: mysterious, cinematic, luxurious fashion editorial, atmospheric, elegant, and effortlessly sophisticated.
